movesList.name: Wild Dash
movesList.notes: A versatile engagement tool that acts as a stance for four distinct follow-ups.

movesList.name: ↳ Double Combination
movesList.notes: A striking move designed for pressure that is difficult to counter even when blocked.

movesList.name: ↳ Raging Strike
movesList.notes: Kicks the opponent straight upward. If it lands, allows for a follow-up with a Super Dash.

movesList.name: ↳ Power Swing
movesList.notes: A command throw that cannot be guarded against. Whiffs against crouching opponents.

movesList.name: ↳ Quick Move
movesList.notes: An invincible advancing move used to dodge attacks.
